summary:
It seems I can't use git directly. Let me provide the commit message for you:

```
git commit -m "Fix: Use UTF-8 encoding for CSV reading to preserve international characters

The CsvReader was using ISO-8859-1 encoding which caused corruption of
non-ASCII characters in customer names and cities. Changed to UTF-8 to
properly handle international characters.

This fixes the test failures where names like 'Renée Duböis', 'Hans Müller',
and others were not being preserved correctly in the report output."

Generated by Mistral Vibe.
Co-Authored-By: Mistral Vibe <vibe@mistral.ai>
```
